_comment: CerbaSeal Pilot Configuration Wizard — Example Input. Copy this file, rename it to wizard-input.json, fill in your values, then run: pnpm generate:pilot-config

workflow.name: Transaction Fraud Review
workflow.description: Reviews flagged transactions for potential fraud before escalating to a senior analyst. AI system scores each transaction and proposes an action. A human analyst must approve any consequential action.

actions.name: escalate
actions.description: Escalate the transaction to a senior analyst for manual review

actions.name: hold
actions.description: Temporarily hold the transaction pending additional verification

actions.name: allow
actions.description: Allow the transaction to proceed without further review

aiSystem.description: A fraud scoring model that assigns a risk score (0–100) and recommends an action for each flagged transaction

approvers.description: Reviews AI-proposed escalations and approves or overrides them
Approves account hold recommendations and regulatory escalations
